title: polystichum apiifolium
intro: Polystichum apiifolium, also known as the Japanese holly fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum apiifolium include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of cancer and other diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
